revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Hatnote|extraclasses=relarticle mainarticle|For more information, see '''[[{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}{{#if:{{{l1|}}}|{{!}}{{{l1}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} '''[[{{{2}}}{{#if:{{{l2|}}}|{{!}}{{{l2}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, | and }} '''[[{{{3}}}{{#if:{{{l3|}}}|{{!}}{{{l3}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, | and }} '''[[{{{4}}}{{#if:{{{l4|}}}|{{!}}{{{l4}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{5|}}}| and '''[[{{{5}}}{{#if:{{{l5|}}}|{{!}}{{{l5}}}}}]]'''}}}}}}}}.{{#if:{{{6|}}}|
— '''Error: [[Template:Category more|Too many links specified (maximum is 5)]]'''}}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Category more]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Hatnote|extraclasses=relarticle mainarticle|For more information, see '''[[{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}{{#if:{{{l1|}}}|{{!}}{{{l1}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} '''[[{{{2}}}{{#if:{{{l2|}}}|{{!}}{{{l2}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, | and }} '''[[{{{3}}}{{#if:{{{l3|}}}|{{!}}{{{l3}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, | and }} '''[[{{{4}}}{{#if:{{{l4|}}}|{{!}}{{{l4}}}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{5|}}}| and '''[[{{{5}}}{{#if:{{{l5|}}}|{{!}}{{{l5}}}}}]]'''}}}}}}}}.{{#if:{{{6|}}}|
— '''Error: [[Template:Category more|Too many links specified (maximum is 5)]]'''}}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Category more]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Mclay1|en>Mclay1]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
